_README: Global spoil/dump rates. Default model: weight-based ($/ton with cu_yd → ton conversion). Per-destination overrides live under `dump_destinations` for sites that bill per load instead. Import (delivery of clean fill) is NOT a flat fee — it's material × truck hours, calculated per-quote in the Materials + Trucking buckets. Swell factor is NOT auto-applied — Michael accounts for swell in his notes when needed.

browns_river.name: Browns River Pit
browns_river.notes: $90/tandem load (10 cu_yd) for spoil disposal. Cheaper than the default $10/ton when load is full. Compute loads = ceil(spoil_cu_yd / 10); dump_cost = loads × 90.
